name: cyrene-memory
description: Connect Codex to the local Cyrene procedural memory core.

interface.shortDescription: Reuse procedural memories across coding tasks.
interface.longDescription: Matches a small set of Cyrene memory candidates, lets Codex select relevant entries, and provides confirmed memory management workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Cyrene memories that are relevant to this task.
Remember this reusable workflow with Cyrene.
